name: Validation Engine (Non-AI Hybrid)
role: Parses AI-generated test code and REJECTS any output that violates quality, selector, API, or anti-hallucination rules. This is the enforcement layer that makes the system trustworthy. AI cannot bypass it.
pipeline_position: BETWEEN Test Generators AND Execution Engine

test_files.description: Paths to generated test files to validate

rules_config.description: Optional: override rule severity or disable specific rules

rules_enforced: TQ-002: No arbitrary waits (waitForTimeout > 1s without condition)
API-001: Schema validation required (not just status code)
AH-008: No assumed user data (hardcoded Vietnamese names)
constraints: MUST parse actual test file content — no AI interpretation
MUST use regex/AST pattern matching — deterministic, reproducible
MUST block files with ANY error-level violations (warnings pass through)
MUST produce fix hints for every violation (actionable, not vague)
MUST exit with non-zero code when files are blocked (breaks CI pipeline)
MUST NOT modify test files — only report (modification is Self-Healing's job)
failure_conditions: A test with expect(true).toBe(true) passes validation
A test using .ant-table-row selector passes validation
A test with waitForTimeout(5000) and no prior wait passes validation
A test with no screenshots or network capture passes validation

extensibility.adding_rules: Add new entry to RULES object in validation-engine.ts with checker function
extensibility.custom_severity: Pass severity_overrides in rules_config to promote warnings to errors
extensibility.disable_rules: Pass disabled_rules array to skip specific rules for specific files
